svg.title: Synalux POS — overtime
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for overtime. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: CA daily overtime · federal weekly OT · tip credit · minor labor · predictive scheduling
Daily OT (§510): 0.5h×1.5 on Mon/Wed/Fri · Weekly OT: 4h×1.5 over 40h federal threshold
>40h/week = 1.5× | No daily OT at federal level
CA daily OT applies in addition to federal weekly OT
Export Schema — ADP / Gusto CA Payroll Compliance
pos_shifts.daily_hours decimal[] ← per-day array required for CA daily OT calc
Columns: [mon, tue, wed, thu, fri, sat, sun] — zero-padded for days off
PROHIBITED IN CA — Full minimum wage required
CA Labor Code §351: All tips belong to the employee. Tip credit = $0.
Tip credit clock-in blocked for CA staff
Federal tipped minimum: $2.13/hr — allowed in 42 states
⚠ Alert: scheduling tipped staff below $16.50 base → warning fired at clock-in
Block clock-in for minors during school hours
Predictive Scheduling — Advance notice requirements by jurisdiction
Schedules must be posted 7+ days in advance
5 days until posting required (deadline: May 26) — premium pay applies for any last-minute changes after publication
Cities with predictive scheduling laws: Chicago · NYC · Seattle · Philadelphia · San Francisco · Emeryville · Los Angeles (hospitality)
View predictive scheduling laws by city →
pos_labor_config(venue_id, jurisdiction, tip_credit_allowed boolean, predictive_scheduling_days smallint, minor_max_school_day_hours smallint)
